name: SVG TOP
description: The SVG TOP has been deprecated and no longer works. Try [[palette:webSvg]] as an alternative. See also the [[Web Render TOP]].

parameters.name: File
parameters.label: File
parameters.description: The path and name of the SVG file to load. File format .svg supported.

parameters.name: Reload
parameters.label: Reload
parameters.description: Change from 0 to 1 to force the file to reload, useful when the file changes or did not exist at first.

parameters.name: Anti-Alias
parameters.label: Anti-Alias
parameters.description: Sets the level of anti-aliasing in the scene. Setting this to higher values uses more graphics memory.

parameters.name: Background Color
parameters.label: Background Color
parameters.description: Sets the background color in the image.

parameters.name: Background Alpha
parameters.label: Background Alpha
parameters.description: Sets the background alpha in the image.

parameters.name: Transform Order
parameters.label: Transform Order
parameters.description: The menu attached to this parameter allows you to specify the order in which the changes to your TOP will take place. Changing the Transform order will change where things go much the same way as going a block and turning east gets you to a different place than turning east and then going a block.

parameters.name: Rotate Order
parameters.label: Rotate Order
parameters.description: The rotational matrix presented when you click on this option allows you to set the transform order for the TOP's rotations. As with transform order (above), changing the order in which the TOP's rotations take place will alter the TOP's final position.

parameters.name: Translate
parameters.label: Translate
parameters.description: The two fields for Translate allows you to specify transforms in x and y axes.

parameters.name: Translate Unit
parameters.label: Translate Unit
parameters.description: Select the units for this parameter from Pixels, Fraction (0-1), Fraction Aspect (0-1 considering aspect ratio).

parameters.name: Rotate
parameters.label: Rotate
parameters.description: The three fields for Rotate allow you to specify the amount of rotation along any of the three axes.

parameters.name: Scale
parameters.label: Scale
parameters.description: The two fields for Scale allows you to specify transforms in x and y axes.

parameters.name: Pivot
parameters.label: Pivot
parameters.description: The Pivot point edit fields allow you to define the point about which the TOP scales and rotates. Altering the pivot point of a TOP produces different results depending on the transformation performed on the TOP image. For example, during a scaling operation, if the pivot point of a TOP image is located at -1,-1 and you wanted to scale the image by 0.5 (reduce its size by 50%), then the TOP would scale toward the pivot point and appear to slide down and to the left.

parameters.name: Pivot Unit
parameters.label: Pivot Unit
parameters.description: Select the units for this parameter from Pixels, Fraction (0-1), Fraction Aspect (0-1 considering aspect ratio).

_provenance.fact: scraped from the live SVG_TOP wiki page
